assessments.status_rationale: No item in today’s news indicates Spirit Airlines has filed for Chapter 7 or announced a liquidation/wind-down in an SEC filing or court docket. Deadline is 2026-05-31, so this remains unresolved.

Today’s bullets mention Fed-chair jockeying (e.g., a CNBC piece about Kevin Warsh), but do not provide evidence of a formal White House nomination transmitted to the Senate with a PN number on Congress.gov. Deadline is 2026-05-31.

No Federal Register final/interim final rule (or mandatory survey notice) is referenced today regarding large data centers reporting electricity consumption at least monthly/quarterly. Deadline is 2026-10-31.
Nothing in today’s news addresses Amazon ‘Advertising services’ revenue growth in a specific quarterly release for quarters ending after 2026-06-30. Deadline is 2026-11-30.

MarketWatch reports a jury finding that Live Nation is an illegal monopoly and commentary that a breakup is unlikely, but this is not evidence that DOJ has filed/announced a court document explicitly seeking a structural remedy (divestiture/spin-off/breakup). Deadline is 2026-12-31.
No CPI data for September 2026 (including ‘Beef and veal’ YoY) is available in today’s news. Deadline is 2026-10-15.
Today’s bullets do not report a BLS Employment Situation release showing U-3 unemployment at or above 5.0%. Deadline is 2026-09-30.

No Coinbase security/engineering publication is referenced today committing to post-quantum cryptography with explicit ‘post-quantum’ + ‘NIST’ language and a dated deployment milestone in 2027 or earlier. Deadline is 2026-12-31.

Today’s news notes oil prices falling amid Middle East ceasefire developments, but does not establish that ICE Brent front-month had a daily settlement at or above $110.00/bbl. Deadline is 2026-06-30.
